assertions.title: CSP structure remains valid in production

steps.action: Extract CSP content attribute from dist/index.html
steps.expected: CSP meta tag present with content attribute
steps.observed: CSP found: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' https://img.youtube.com data:; connect-src 'self';

steps.action: Verify all 5 required directives present (default-src, script-src, style-src, img-src, connect-src)
steps.expected: All 5 directives found in CSP string

evidence.cspString: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' https://img.youtube.com data:; connect-src 'self';

assertions.title: All 12 preload.js IPC channels remain functional

steps.action: Verify each of the 12 API names exists in preload.js
steps.expected: All 12 API names found: openVideoWindow, closeVideoWindow, closeAllVideoWindows, checkResourcesFolder, getResourcesFiles, openAnki, openResource, getResourcesInfo, selectResourcesFolder, resetResourcesPath, exportProgressBackup, openExternalUrl
steps.observed: All 12 API names confirmed present via grep

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed. VAL-CROSS-005 confirmed production CSP contains all 5 required directives with no unsafe-eval. VAL-CROSS-006 confirmed all 12 IPC channels intact in preload.js with exactly 12 ipcRenderer.invoke calls.
